Off Calendar Mar-07-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Mitchell R. Vanlandingham; Koeller, Nebeker, Carlson & Haluck, LLP; 916-724-5700; appearing for defendants The Related Companies of CA, LLC and Mission Bay Block 7 Housing Partners, LP.
Alexander Wall; Sullivan Hill Rez & Engel, APLC; 619-233-4100; appearing for plaintiff Mission Bay Block 7 Housing Partners, LP.
Ganette M. Genetti; Sellar Hazard & Lucia, APLC; 925-938-1430; appearing for defendnt and cross-defendants Nibbi Bors. Associates, Inc. and Egan Plumbing, Inc.
James M. Millar; Millar Law Firm, APLC; 415-981-8100; apearing for plaintiffs Texas Starr, Diana Johnson, and Thomas McElroy.

Mr. Vanlandingham contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-21-594840 WITH CASE CGC-20-585366 is DENIED. This action is not appropriate for consolidation for all purposes. The Court does not find that consolidation would avoid unnecessary costs or delay for all parties.
